description: The Open Dive Team presents their project at the Solana x Serum DeFi Hackathon Demo Day, showcasing their MMORPG concept, Open Arrow, which integrates DeFi elements and immersive technologies.
topic_summary: Presentation of Open Arrow, an MMORPG integrating DeFi and immersive technologies, at the Solana x Serum Hackathon [t=0:00]. Discussion includes project overview, technology integration, and community engagement [t=83:10].
